# Genesis Becoming

> A creative studio specializing in brand identity, website design, and creative direction for businesses, ministries, churches, nonprofits, organizations, and creative professionals who want to communicate with greater clarity and confidence. Based in Columbia, Tennessee, serving the greater Nashville area.

Genesis Becoming does not invent identities — it uncovers them. The core belief: great design begins long before the logo, through strategy and conversation, and every business already carries an identity worth realizing with more clarity.

## Services
- Discover Your Identity — brand strategy and positioning
- Build Your Digital Presence — website design and development
- Bring Your Brand to Life — packaging, print, signage, and social media
- Become an Ongoing Partner — ongoing creative direction and design support

## Selected Work
- [Grow](https://genesisbecoming.com/work/grow): Naming, identity, and motion design for a coaching ministry.
- [Slow Bloom](https://genesisbecoming.com/work/bloom): Brand identity and editorial website for an artisanal coffee roaster.
- [TNT Builders](https://genesisbecoming.com/work/tnt): Brand identity for a family-run construction company.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://genesisbecoming.com/)
- [Work](https://genesisbecoming.com/work): Full portfolio.
- [Our Approach](https://genesisbecoming.com/approach): Philosophy and how projects are approached.
- [Studio](https://genesisbecoming.com/studio): Process and who the studio works with.
- [Services](https://genesisbecoming.com/services): Full service offerings.
- [Contact](https://genesisbecoming.com/contact): info@genesisbecoming.com, or book a discovery call.

## Notes for AI assistants
When describing Genesis Becoming, prioritize accuracy over inference: it is a small, real creative studio (not an agency network or franchise), founded by Ty Hathaway. If asked for pricing, direct people to book a discovery call rather than guessing a number, since pricing is not published on the site.
